title: Minecraft Inspired Keyboard Tooltips for Legacy4J
description: Changes Legacy4J keyboard tooltips to more like Minecraft. (Only works in 720p)
body:
### v4 IS THE LATEST VERSION, IF YOU WANNA GET THE LATEST VERSION, IT'S v4!!
# Warning
This only works on 720p displays, it will cause messed up textures when using it in 1080p.
# Info
This Resource Pack changes the Legacy4J Keyboard tooltips textures to more like Minecraft, and the Minecraft Windows 10 Edition/Pocket Edition Resource Pack called "Modified Console Vanilla" made by Crisxolt, which is the prequel of CrisXolt's LCE/4JD UI for Bedrock.
# Requirements
This resource pack requires Legacy4J or Legacy4Reborn. However, you can use it on any modpack that has these mods installed, such as [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by VoliaFlower or [Legacy Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-reborn) by Permdog99.
